name: Access.Database
signature: Access.Database(database as binary, optional options as nullable record) as table
description: Returns a structural representation of an Access database, `database`. An optional record parameter, `options`, may be specified to control the following options: * `CreateNavigationProperties`: A logical (true/false) that sets whether to generate navigation properties on the returned values (default is false). * `NavigationPropertyNameGenerator`: A function that is used for the creation of names for navigation properties. The record parameter is specified as [option1 = value1, option2 = value2...], for example.
